params.description: Values for the `{placeholders}` in the chosen path, e.g. {"uuid": "..."} for `/persons/{uuid}` or {"id": "...", "timestamp": "..."} for `/events/{id}/{timestamp}`. Must match the placeholders exactly; pass {} for a path with none.

url.description:
A path template copied verbatim from the catalog below (e.g. `/persons/{uuid}`). Its `{placeholders}` are filled from `params`. These slugs come from PostHog's canonical route table, so they are always correct — never pass a path that is not in this list.
